name: Untrusted Content
description: Sanitize and quarantine untrusted tool output through a local tool-untrusted-content service.

enabled.label: Enable Guard
enabled.help: When enabled, selected tool results are scanned before they reach agent context.

baseUrl.label: Service Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the tool-untrusted-content API.

toolNames.label: Guarded Tools
toolNames.help: Tool names whose results should be guarded, for example web_fetch or browser.

trustLevel.label: Trust Level
trustLevel.help: Default trust level sent to the untrusted-content pipeline.

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout
timeoutSeconds.help: HTTP timeout for the guard service in seconds.

maxContentChars.label: Max Input Chars
maxContentChars.help: Maximum characters forwarded to the guard service per content block.

onError.label: Service Error Mode
onError.help: Choose whether tool results pass through or get replaced when the guard service is unavailable.

sanitize.label: Force Sanitizer
sanitize.help: Override pipeline sanitize stage for guarded calls.

guardrail.label: Force Guardrail
guardrail.help: Override pipeline guardrail stage for guarded calls.

scan.label: Force Scanner
scan.help: Override pipeline scan stage for guarded calls.
